handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_account_summary {"req_id":"$req1","account":"All","tags":["NetLiquidation","BuyingPower"]}
server account_summary {"req_id":"$req1","account":"DU12345","tag":"NetLiquidation","value":"100000.00","currency":"USD"}
server account_summary {"req_id":"$req1","account":"DU99999","tag":"NetLiquidation","value":"200000.00","currency":"USD"}
server account_summary {"req_id":"$req1","account":"DU12345","tag":"BuyingPower","value":"50000.00","currency":"USD"}
server account_summary_end {"req_id":"$req1"}
client cancel_account_summary {"req_id":"$req1"}
disconnect
